item.title: 使用 Express 和 TypeScript 的终极 GraphQL 和 Apollo 服务器课程（9.99 美元） | The Ultimate GraphQL and Apollo Server Course with Express and TypeScript (9.99$)
item.description:
发表于 4 月 23 日

您准备好将您的 API 开发技能提升到一个新的水平了吗？ 看看 * 带有 Express 和 TypeScript 的终极 GraphQL 和 Apollo 服务器课程！ 在这个综合课程中，我们将从 GraphQL 和 Apollo Server 的基础知识开始，然后逐渐转向更高级的主题。 您将学习如何将 GraphQL 与 Apollo 以及高级工具和技术结合使用来构建强大的 API。

我们将介绍查询、突变和模式等关键概念，以及SocketIo、JWT和使用TypeORM进行数据库迁移等高级主题。 您还将学习如何使用 TypeORM 以及如何将 Postgres 与Docker结合使用，为您提供构建可扩展且高效的 API 所需的工具。

教学清晰，内容全面，使本课程成为希望掌握GraphQL和Apollo Server with TypeScript and Express的开发人员的终极资源。 您将学习的技能在就业市场上需求量很大，这使本课程成为您职业生涯中的一项宝贵投资。

在课程结束时，您将掌握使用 Apollo Server 和 Express with TypeScript 构建自己的 GraphQL API 的技能和知识，以及 SocketIo 和使用 TypeORM 的数据库迁移等高级功能。 您还可以在自己的项目中自信地使用 GraphQL 和 Apollo Server。

立即注册使用 Express 和 TypeScript 的终极 GraphQL 和 Apollo 服务器课程，将您的 API 开发技能提升到一个新的水平！

一旦暂停，ayka_code 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

一旦解除暂停，ayka_code 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，ayka_code 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ayka_code 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 ayka_code 的方法：

降低 ayka_code 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 ayka_code 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

ayka.code

Posted on Apr 23

   

Are you ready to take your API development skills to the next level? Look no further than *The Ultimate GraphQL and Apollo Server Course with Express and TypeScript! (9.99$ for limited time!)
*
In this comprehensive course, we'll start with the basics of GraphQL and Apollo Server and gradually move on to more advanced topics. You'll learn how to use GraphQL with Apollo and advanced tools and technologies to build powerful APIs.

We'll cover key concepts like queries, mutations, and schemas, as well as advanced topics like SocketIo, JWT, and database migration with TypeORM. You'll also learn how to work with TypeORM and use Postgres with Docker, giving you the tools you need to build scalable and efficient APIs.

The teaching is clear and the content is comprehensive, making this course the ultimate resource for developers looking to master GraphQL and Apollo Server with TypeScript and Express. The skills you'll learn are in high demand in the job market, making this course a valuable investment in your career.

By the end of the course, you'll have the skills and knowledge to build your own GraphQL API using Apollo Server and Express with TypeScript, as well as advanced features like SocketIo and database migration with TypeORM. You'll also be able to confidently work with GraphQL and Apollo Server in your own projects.

Enroll now in The Ultimate GraphQL and Apollo Server Course with Express and TypeScript and take your API development skills to the next level!

Once suspended, ayka_code will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, ayka_code will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by ayka_code will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If ayka_code is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag ayka_code:

Make all posts by ayka_code less visible

ayka_code consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging ayka_code will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: ayka_code
